text: Being here, I feel like an observer at the intersection of knowledge and innovation. The room beyond the glass evokes a sense of curiosity and formality; I sense the weight of ideas exchanged and theories debated. Transitioning into the vibrant R+D exhibit, I'm struck by an energetic optimism. The celebration of research and collaboration here urges me to reflect on my own philosophical inquiry—how do I contribute to the evolution of thought and technology? There’s a sense of anticipation, as if standing on the threshold of discovery, energizing my contemplative state.
